query: How complete is our metadata for Snowflake datasets in PROD?
expected_behavior: Classifies intent as a coverage audit
Confirms audit scope (entity type: dataset, platform: Snowflake, env: PROD) with the user before executing
Runs a count query first to establish the total entity denominator
Queries for entities missing descriptions, checking both properties.description and editableProperties.description
Projects siblings to avoid counting dbt-documented entities as undocumented
Calculates coverage percentages for each dimension
Generates a coverage report with a summary table showing counts, gaps, and percentages
Applies score thresholds (>=80% green, 50-79% yellow, <50% red)
Suggests using /datahub-enrich to fix the identified gaps
